learnings: v2.0 QA engine shipped: 9-phase cycle runs q6h via launchd
GitHub security scanner built (Phase 2.5): 9 scan types, 0 P0/P1 clean
link-check.sh built: HTML/JS/MD link validation with live HTTP checks
Exit code fix: score 70-89 now exits 0 (was 1, caused simulation failures)
grep -P not available on macOS BSD - never use it
False positive patterns: $-prefixed JS vars, .env.example, usage CSVs with 'token' column names
triggers: com.hyo.nel-qa launchd daemon fires q6h. GitHub scan is Phase 2.5 - runs automatically. No session needed for QA.
next_session: Verify GitHub scan ran autonomously overnight. Check logs for Phase 2.5 output. Wire introspective self-assessment report for HQ.

description: Phase 7.5: Rendered Output Verification added to 10-phase QA cycle. Checks: (1) morning report JSON exists + current date + hq.html has rendering code, (2) Aether balance not default $1000/0, (3) Aether strategies count >= 2, (4) data-to-HTML binding audit — every JSON in website/data/ must be referenced in hq.html. P0 for missing rendering code, P1 for stale data, P2 for low strategy count or unbound files. Triggered by Hyo catching morning report gap that Nel missed. Also added Simulation Phase 6 (Rendered Output Pathway Verification) to dispatch.sh.
assessment: major capability gap closed — Nel now tests rendered output, not just infrastructure

summary: Fixed 2 chronic false positives: (1) stat_mode regex rejected BSD 4-digit output 0600 — added _bsd_norm_mode to strip leading zero; (2) secrets-dir-permissions stat'd symlink mode (0755) instead of target — added stat_mode_L follow-symlink wrapper. Verified with re-run: founder-token-integrity + secrets-dir-permissions both resolved (15-day chronics). Sentinel now 7p/2f, 0 P0.

reflection.learning: BSD vs GNU stat output differs by leading 0; sentinel ran 15 days flagging false P0 nobody actioned because everyone knew it was false — exactly the kind of chronic false positive that masks real P0s.

weakness: Static Checks Never Adapt — Sentinel Runs Same 9 Checks Until Failure Is Deafening
summary: Fixed via Claude Code delegate — see agents/nel/research/improvements/W1-2026-04-22.md
